grid_source: mk_test/t2/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json
raw_text: ระดับหลังคาน +3.75, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00. บัวปูนปั้น กว้าง 0.10 ม. ลึก 0.10 ม. กันสาด คสล. เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC. Grid callouts along the bottom: 1, 2, 3 with spans 4.00 / 3.00 / 0.60+0.70, bracketed 1.30 on each end, overall 7.00 span shown. Door/window numbered callouts 1, 2 (referencing A-08 schedule).
description: Front elevation (รูปด้าน 1) of the house along grid line row corresponding to the front (entry) facade, spanning grid 1 to grid 3. Shows a flat-topped fascia/eave band at the top with a plaster cornice (บัวปูนปั้น) detail, a concrete canopy/eave (กันสาด คสล.) over the entry, sliding glass door and window openings (door type 1/window type 1 callouts per A-08), brick-veneer wainscot at the base, and a control-joint or PVC-strip reveal (เซาะร่อง/ฝังเส้น PVC) on the wall face. Floor-to-roof height datum: ±0.00 (reference) to +0.60 (ground floor level) to +3.75 (roof-beam level). No roof slope indicated on this particular elevation (roof appears near-flat/parapet in this view, consistent with the low-slope monopitch roof seen edge-on).
warnings: Classified as 'unknown' per the schema's own guidance that elevations with no schedule/quantity data are an expected unknown-pattern outcome; level datums and grid spans were still transcribed since they were clearly legible and useful.
This page (A-05) contains two elevations; the second (รูปด้าน 2) is in sibling file _หน้า07_elevation2.json.
